metadata.description: SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) Skills marketplace for software development workflow. Contains plugins for workflow management, model routing, and development productivity.

plugins.name: mumu-sop
plugins.description: SOP Skills for software development workflow with 18 skills covering orchestration, specification, implementation, verification, maintenance, and documentation.

plugins.name: mumu-model-router
plugins.description: Model routing plugin that allows different agents and subagents to use different models and API endpoints. Includes 4 pre-configured agents for fast response, code implementation, architecture decisions, and batch processing.
